Notice Of Motion And Motion For Continuance Of Action By The Successor In Interest Of Plaintiffs Estate
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MORRIS DANIELS' Motion For Continuance Of Action By The Successor In Interest Of Plaintiffs Estate is OFF CALENDAR. The motion does not seek any relief that this department is able to grant or should grant. There are no motions pending in this department and thus no motions that need or can be continued. There is no trial date and thus the trial does not need nor could it be continued and, in all events, a motion to continue the trial should be filed to be heard in department 206, not department 302. If the motion is characterized as seeking a stay of the action pending the appointment of a successor in interest for Mr. Daniels, the motion papers fail to state why a motion has not or cannot be filed seeking such an appointment and the court is unable to discern any reason why such a motion has not or cannot be filed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported (D302)
